source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent front-facing cow head with a deliberately varied side-eye expression.

process_strategy: The contact sheet builds one cow face from a broad head guide through the ears, horns, muzzle, expression, patches, thick outline, marker fills, and final clarity pass.

final_elements.name: broad cow head guide
final_elements.description: A wide tapered head with a vertical center guide.

final_elements.name: ears, short horns, and oval muzzle
final_elements.description: Wide ears, small horns, and a large lower muzzle.

final_elements.name: half-lidded side-looking eyes, raised brow, nostrils, and crooked toothy grin
final_elements.description: A visibly asymmetrical cheeky expression unlike dot eyes and a U-smile.

final_elements.name: forehead tuft and cow patches
final_elements.description: A small hair tuft and several irregular patches on the existing head.

final_elements.name: black, pink, golden yellow, and teal marker color
final_elements.description: Bold fills on the established patches, muzzle, horns, ears, and eyes.

frames.visible_job: Places the broad tapered head and center guide.
Adds the wide ears, short horns, and oval muzzle to the guide.
introduces: ears, short horns, and oval muzzle

frames.visible_job: Adds half-lidded eyes looking sideways, one raised brow, nostrils, and a crooked toothy grin.
introduces: half-lidded side-looking eyes, raised brow, nostrils, and crooked toothy grin
requires_prior_elements: ears, short horns, and oval muzzle

frames.visible_job: Adds the forehead tuft and irregular cow patches on established shapes.
requires_prior_elements: ears, short horns, and oval muzzle
half-lidded side-looking eyes, raised brow, nostrils, and crooked toothy grin

frames.visible_job: Thickens the established outlines and fills the existing patches and features with marker color.
introduces: black, pink, golden yellow, and teal marker color
requires_prior_elements: ears, short horns, and oval muzzle
half-lidded side-looking eyes, raised brow, nostrils, and crooked toothy grin

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established contours, expression, patches, and marker fills.

rejection_checks: No ear, horn, muzzle, eye, brow, grin, tooth, tuft, patch, color, or highlight may first appear in the final image.
The cow must retain one front-facing pose, scale, and expression across every frame.
Reject a two-dot-eye and small U-smile face, glossy vector treatment, sticker border, badge frame, text, or bell prop.
